blockers.description: Swarm Health P0 — 26.5% failure rate (35/132 agents) due to credit/quota exhaustion across all 4 driver types. Human billing action required.

Hook DX P1: claude-hook-wrapper.sh exits non-zero on allow decisions; stderr output creates misleading 'blocking error' labels. QA agents limited to 1 GitHub action/session.
